channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: After Beheading Attempt in Ireland, New York Times Says Real Violence Comes from Right-Wingers
item.description: The publication described Belfast protesters as far-right radicals while calling BLM protesters peaceful with room for rage.

item.title: Why Doesn't America Denaturalize in the Thousands Like It Used To?
item.description: A major denaturalization effort is needed to correct mistaken citizenship awards over the past 60 years.

item.title: Grassley: Democrats Want to 'Rig the Supreme Court' So They Can Ignore the Constitution
item.description: Grassley's statement follows several Democratic efforts to expand the Supreme Court.

item.title: Melania Trump Unveils New Savings Account for Foster Care Youth, Powered by Trump Accounts
item.description: First lady Melania Trump announced new savings options for foster youth called Fostering the Future Accounts.
